name: Plundering Shipwreck at %LOCATION_NAME
description:
Hidden beneath a rotting floorboard in what must have once been a finely appointed officer's cabin, %PERSON_NAME finds a small strongbox that jangles with the sound of coins. Alongside the strongbox is a badly damage note, mentioning a second, larger cache of gold hidden in the bilge. Should %PERSON_NAME leave now with the strongbox and its contents, or try to find the second cache of gold in the shattered, flooded bilge.

(Agent HP is currently %HP)

outcomes.description: %PERSON_NAME leaves the ship with the strongbox, which contains 30 gold

choices.name: Seek the cache in the bilge
choices.description:
-25% chance to find an additional 100 gold

-20% chance to suffer 2 damage

-15% chance to suffer 4 damage

-40% to find nothing

outcomes.description:
%PERSON_NAME finds the second cache and gains an additional 100 gold.
(100 gold gained)

%PERSON_NAME recieves numerous cuts and bruises as they search through the murky water of the rubble-strewn bilge.
(2 HP lost)

%PERSON_NAME is badly wounded as they attempt to shift rubble during their search, and is forced to withdraw.
(4 HP lost)
%PERSON_NAME searches for some time, but finds nothing of value in the murky water of the rubble-strewn bilge.
